## xsh put host

Store host in database

### Synopsis

Store host data in database either from a file or interactive prompting

```
xsh put host [flags]
```

### Examples

```
xsh put host
```

### Options

```
  -f, --file string   Path of the host file (default "/path/to/file")
  -h, --help          help for host
  -i, --interactive   Insert host in interactive mode
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -d, --debug   Enable debug logging
```
